title: eleocharis rugosa
intro: Eleocharis rugosa, also known as the rough-spiked sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis rugosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
